title: Generation-4 evolution audit: process all next_audit_inputs + fresh sweep of the gen-3/cronsplain/swarm traffic (readiness criterion 7)
description: claude.md 5A audit, the PRODUCTION-READINESS gate: criterion 7 says the harness is production-ready when this audit finds only document-only/low items - no open HIGH/MED mechanical gap. Scope: ALL state.json evolution.next_audit_inputs (11 items: P-009 follow-ups, volatile-line citations, slugger pseudocode nit, F6 prose nit, done-on-done coherence, worker-registration liveness question NOW RESOLVED by T-042/T-053 - verify and close it, P-020 sonnet-verifier quality assessment WITH the T-051/T-052 data point, node --test false-green rule, backtick-note rule, verbatim-promotion definition) PLUS a fresh trajectory sweep of events.jsonl/transcript.jsonl covering T-042..T-054 (guardrail v2 rollout, registration auth, cronsplain epic, swarm smokes). For each: quoted evidence, severity (HIGH/MED/LOW/DOC), falsifiable proposal or explicit no-action ruling. CRITICAL DELIVERABLE: the PRODUCTION-READINESS VERDICT - walk the 7 readiness criteria in state.json evolution.readiness_criteria against current evidence and declare each MET/UNMET with citations; state plainly whether the harness is production-ready and what (if anything) blocks. Deliver .harness/logs/audit_gen4.md. PROPOSE only. Handoff to verifier.
